# Touchstone Digital Solutions

> Family-owned company specializing in fully customized interactive digital Hall of Fame, donor recognition, and touchscreen recognition software for K–12 schools, universities, athletic departments, and community organizations. Every display is built from scratch to reflect each institution's identity, with Emmy-nominated UI/UX design, unlimited customization, and 24/7 lifetime support. Based in Bedford, NH. Serves the United States with 150+ installations across North America.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://touchstone-ds.com/): Interactive Digital Hall of Fame software overview.
- [About](https://touchstone-ds.com/about/): Family-owned company story, team, mission, and values.
- [Contact](https://touchstone-ds.com/contact/): Request an introductory packet or schedule a demo.
- [FAQ](https://touchstone-ds.com/faq/): Pricing, installation, support, hardware, integrations, and product capabilities.
- [Features](https://touchstone-ds.com/features/): Platform features, CMS, multimedia support, and design capabilities.
- [Compare Us](https://touchstone-ds.com/compare-us/): How Touchstone compares to alternative recognition software vendors.
- [Touchstone vs Gipper](https://touchstone-ds.com/touchstone-vs-gipper/): Direct feature and service comparison.

## Software Products

- [Touchscreen Software](https://touchstone-ds.com/touchscreen-software/): Core interactive touchscreen recognition platform.
- [Digital Trophy Case](https://touchstone-ds.com/digital-trophy-case/): Virtual trophy case with multimedia, templates, and cloud storage.
- [Digital Donor Walls](https://touchstone-ds.com/digital-donor-walls/): Interactive donor recognition displays.
- [Digital Record Boards](https://touchstone-ds.com/digital-record-boards/): Live-updating athletic and academic record boards.
- [Digital Yearbooks](https://touchstone-ds.com/digital-yearbooks/): Interactive yearbooks with photos, videos, and student stories.
- [Yearbook Scanning](https://touchstone-ds.com/yearbook-scanning/): Physical yearbook digitization service.
- [Digital History Archive](https://touchstone-ds.com/digital-history-archive/): Searchable, web-accessible institutional archives.
- [Interactive Athletic Environments](https://touchstone-ds.com/interactive-athletic-environments/): Locker rooms, gyms, and athletic facility installations.
- [Touchstone Fundraising](https://touchstone-ds.com/touchstone-fundraising/): Fundraising-focused recognition and donor engagement displays.

## Hardware

- [Touchscreen Hardware](https://touchstone-ds.com/touchscreen-hardware/): Commercial-grade interactive touchscreen displays.
- [55-inch Touchscreen Display](https://touchstone-ds.com/touchscreen-hardware/55-inch-touchscreen-display/): PCAP multi-touch, 3-year warranty, 24/7 commercial operation.
- [65-inch Touchscreen Display](https://touchstone-ds.com/touchscreen-hardware/65-inch-touchscreen-display/): PCAP multi-touch, 3-year warranty, 24/7 commercial operation.
- [75-inch Touchscreen Display](https://touchstone-ds.com/touchscreen-hardware/75-inch-touchscreen-display/): PCAP multi-touch, 3-year warranty, 24/7 commercial operation.
- [86-inch Touchscreen Display](https://touchstone-ds.com/touchscreen-hardware/86-inch-touchscreen-display/): PCAP multi-touch, 3-year warranty, 24/7 commercial operation.

## Company Facts

- Name: Touchstone Digital Solutions (also: Touchstone DS, TDS)
- Headquarters: 8 Powder Hill Road, Bedford, NH 03110, United States
- Phone: +1 (603) 361-7541
- Email: info@touchstone-ds.com
- Support: support@touchstone-ds.com
- Service area: United States (150+ installations across North America)
- Structure: Family-owned, approximately 10 team members
- Founders: Gardner Sr, Gardner Jr, and Colby
- Pricing: Custom quote per project — no cost to build or maintain; flexible packages
- Support: Unlimited lifetime 24/7 customer service, training, and over-the-air software updates
